title: Illustrative Flow of a Simple Game-Theoretic Algorithm
description: A flowchart illustrating the decision-making process of a rational agent in a basic game scenario, highlighting the steps of strategy consideration, payoff calculation, and equilibrium selection.
elements: Calculate Payoffs for Each Strategy Profile
Check for Dominant Strategy / Best Response
relationships: Process flows sequentially from Start to End
Calculation leads to Checking for dominance/best response
Check leads to Identification of equilibrium
